meta.title: Mayank Joshi — Business Analyst & Data Analyst
meta.description: Mayank Joshi — Business Analyst & Data Analyst with 4+ years experience. MSc Business Analytics (Distinction), Swansea University. Python, SQL, Tableau, Plotly.js.

hero.heading: I turn raw data into business decisions.
hero.subtitle: Business Analyst and Data Analyst with 4+ years of industry experience. I build end-to-end pipelines, interactive dashboards, and ML models that drive measurable outcomes.

about.text: I completed my MSc in Management (Business Analytics) with Distinction at Swansea University in January 2026. Before that, I spent 4+ years working across business analysis, data analytics, and operations — primarily in enterprise mobility and financial services. My approach: start with the business question, then work backwards through the data. I work daily with AI tools like Claude and ChatGPT to accelerate research and analysis. Applying for my Graduate visa in May 2026 and available for full-time work immediately.

services.heading: My expertise
services.description: Turning complex data into clear business value.

items.title: Data Analysis & EDA
items.text: Deep-dive exploratory analysis, hypothesis testing, and statistical modelling to uncover actionable insights from messy real-world datasets.

items.title: Interactive Dashboards
items.text: Production-ready dashboards with Plotly.js, Tableau, and advanced Excel. Live, filterable, and built for stakeholder decision-making.

items.title: Machine Learning
items.text: End-to-end ML pipelines with scikit-learn — from feature engineering to model evaluation. Churn prediction, classification, regression.

timeline.title: MSc Business Analytics
timeline.description: Graduated with Distinction. Dissertation on predictive analytics for customer retention. Modules in data mining, business intelligence, and statistical modelling.

timeline.title: Business Analyst
timeline.description: 4+ years across business analysis, data analytics, and process improvement. Managed financial reporting, built operational dashboards, and drove data-informed decisions across multiple functions.

timeline.title: Freelance & Upskilling
timeline.description: Currently building portfolio projects, contributing to open-source, and deepening expertise in Python, ML, and modern analytics tooling. Daily user of AI tools for accelerated research.

skills.heading: My techstack
skills.description: Tools and technologies used across projects and professional experience.

projects.description: Each project has a live interactive dashboard. Click to explore.

contact.description: I am available immediately, open to any industry and any location worldwide. Let us talk.

cards.text: Business Analyst, Data Analyst, or Analytics roles. Any industry, market-rate compensation.
